response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and leadership in open-source projects, but lacks the required depth in C++ and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure. Their experience aligns more with product development than the specialized technical leadership role described.
strengths: Proven leadership in open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and mentoring (workshops, talks).
Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with a focus on testability.
Strong track record in developer tooling and infrastructure (e.g., CI/CD, GitLab, Docker).
concerns: Only limited C++ experience (primarily at National Instruments, 2014–2015), far below the 8-year requirement.
No explicit experience with cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems in a production environment.
Leadership roles are informal (e.g., workshops, open-source) rather than formal technical leadership (e.g., managing teams).
